channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Binance AI Pro auto-trades with AI brains, slashing lag for beta users. 5M AI credits/mo starts at $9.99. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/binance-ai-pro-simplifies-trading #crypto #ai #trading

item.title: Euro banks plot a euro-stablecoin to rival the dollar—MiCA-compliant, 1:1 reserves, and ready for late-2026. 🔒💶 https://Blockchain.News/news/european-banks-mica-euro-stablecoin-2026 #Crypto #EU #Stablecoins
